comment: The application gets extremely slow when rendering more than 100 entries. It almost crashes my browser.
Can you please add support for dark mode? The current light theme is blinding at night.
The checkout page UI is very confusing. I didn't know which button to click to confirm payment.
I want a feature to export reports as PDF directly. Currently we have to copy-paste.
This tool is too expensive for single developers. Do you have a cheaper tier?
The dashboard lags when loading the analytics graph.
